c.d: How intuitive and easy it is for users to create collages, regardless of their experience level.
The number and diversity of pre-designed templates available for creating different types of collages.
The range of options available for users to personalize their collages, including adjusting layouts, adding text, stickers, and backgrounds.
The availability and quality of built-in photo editing tools such as filters, effects, and adjustments.
How seamlessly the app integrates with social media platforms for sharing collages.
The pricing structure of the app, including whether it is free, offers in-app purchases, or requires a subscription.
